title: Port of Seattle Pier 66 | Seattle CruisePark, Inc.
content: # Port of Seattle Pier 66 - Bell Street Pier Cruise Terminal. The Port of Seattle Pier 66, also known as the Bell Street Pier Cruise Terminal, is a bustling departure point located in downtown Seattle. ## Cruise Lines Departing from Pier 66. Parking at Pier 66 is convenient and offers several options to suit your needs:. Choose Seattle CruisePark for a reliable and stress-free parking experience that complements your cruise from Pier 66. The central location of Pier 66 provides travelers with access to some of Seattle's most iconic attractions and dining experiences:. Pier 66, also known as the Bell Street Pier Cruise Terminal, is located in the heart of downtown Seattle along the Elliott Bay waterfront. Two major cruise lines operate out of Pier 66 in Seattle:. Seattle CruisePark offers complimentary shuttle service to and from Pier 66 (the Bell Street Pier Cruise Terminal). If you're using Seattle CruisePark, factor in a few extra minutes for the complimentary shuttle ride from the parking facility to the terminal.
